ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the park is located */,
  "acres" INTEGER /* Size of the park in acres */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the park */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the park */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the park was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the park */,
  "entrance_fee" REAL /* Entrance fee for the park */,
  "annual_pass_fee" REAL /* Fee for an annual pass */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the park */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the park */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the park information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park being visited */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the visit */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the visit */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the visit */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors */,
  "time_in" TEXT /* Time visitors entered the park */,
  "time_out" TEXT /* Time visitors left the park */,
  "total_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the visit in hours */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., day visit, overnight stay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park generating revenue */,
  "annual_pass" REAL /* Annual pass revenue */,
  "per_person" REAL /* Per-person revenue */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was recorded */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors on that date */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries (tickets sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the administrator manages */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the administrator */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_administrators_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the visitor is associated with */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the visitor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the visitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the visitor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the visitor */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit (e.g., recreation, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the statistic is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the statistic is for */,
  "average_visit_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in hours */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of visitors */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of visitors by gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_stats_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the statistic is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the statistic is for */,
  "total_visitors" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors for the month */,
  "average_revenue_per_visitor" REAL /* Average revenue per visitor */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of revenue (e.g., entrance fees, annual passes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_stats_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)
